node.text: Tim recently started learning how to play the violin and has been playing the piano for about four months.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "instrument play music") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Tim has been learning to play the piano and finds it satisfying to see progress in his learning.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "instrument play music") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Tim's favorite song to play on the piano is a theme from the movie Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone.

node.text: Tim will be staying in Galway for its arts and Irish music.

node.text: Tim felt a sense of belonging at an event last month where everyone shared the same love for a common interest.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "instrument play music") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.77)

node.text: Tim appreciates having something meaningful to keep him motivated, as seen from his conversation with John.
Tim got accepted into a study abroad program in Ireland.
